PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelsey Quaranto for Lawrence Wong.

Ms. Quaranto appeared for the purpose of getting the special letters extended and to provide a proposed order. The order is to be reviewed by the Probate Examiner for filing. The hearing on the general petition is continued to September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Continued To Aug-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelsey Quaranto for Special Administrator.

Ms. Quaranto appeared to request that the letters of special administration be extended to August 22, 2018. The Court granted Ms. Quaranto's request (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is also continued to August 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar May-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
